title: Pals in Paradise
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Will M. Ritchey, Albert Kenyon
actors: Rudolph Schildkraut, John Bowers, Marguerite De La Motte
plot: Bill Harvey discovers a lost mine, rich with gold. Geraldine "Jerry" Howard has the claim to it left her by her father. Bill tells her that the death of the claimant, her father, makes a claim void. Infuriated, she goes to John Ke...
